title: Day 1 LinkedIn Connection Requests
description: Send LinkedIn connection requests to all 24 leads from 3/21 batch (skip bounces: Cvent, Pushpay, Temporal, Figma, Rippling). No pitch — just connect.

title: Fix Bounced Email Addresses
description: Cvent, Pushpay, Alaska Airlines, Temporal (2x), Figma, Rippling bounced on 3/21. Research correct contact emails and re-send or mark as unreachable.

title: Create AI Email Mailboxes
description: Set up dedicated email addresses for automated outreach sequences. Need 2-3 domains (already purchased: rylemconsulting.com, hirerylem.com, scalewithrylem.com). Add to M365 tenant, create mailboxes, connect to Instantly.ai for warmup.

title: Enable DKIM Signing in M365
description: Go to M365 Security portal → Email Authentication → DKIM. Toggle signing ON for rylem.com. All CNAME records are already in Cloudflare.

title: Monday L10 Scorecards Ready
description: Leadership L10 (3 PM), Sales & Non-VMS L10 (Tue 8:30 AM), VMS L10 (Wed 8:30 AM) — all auto-generate via cron. Mike/Liza/Jon/Lanni receive copies via email.
